positive: A stylized, minimalist representation of a majestic wolf howling at a cosmic, full moon. The wolf should have sharp, clean lines and strong, contrasting silhouettes against a nebula-filled night sky. Integrate celestial elements like glowing crescent moons, constellations, and abstract stardust into the background, making the composition dynamic and centered. Utilize a deep indigo, sapphire blue, silver, and warm gold color palette. Style: Geometric, art deco forest/space fusion, suitable for a distressed print effect. Aspect: Centered and impactful, designed for apparel chest print. Composition: High contrast, symmetrical/circular focus.
negative: low quality, bad anatomy, blurry, artifact, text, watermark, signature, logo, copyright, messy, noisy, extra limbs, poor detail, gradients, solid background
